notes: Pinned OCI SDK contract: Create/Get/List/Update/DeleteVbInstance are present, with lifecycle states CREATING, UPDATING, ACTIVE, INACTIVE, DELETING, DELETED, and FAILED. The reviewed runtime treats CREATING, UPDATING, and DELETING as requeue states; ACTIVE and INACTIVE as success; and FAILED as terminal without requeue.

Pinned OCI SDK contract: CreateVbInstanceResponse, UpdateVbInstanceResponse, and DeleteVbInstanceResponse expose opc-work-request-id headers but no resource body. The reviewed runtime follows service-local GetWorkRequest responses, recovers the VbInstance OCID from work-request resources, and rereads GetVbInstance as the authoritative observed-state source.

Pinned OCI SDK contract: ListVbInstancesRequest filters by compartmentId, displayName, and lifecycleState and returns Items []VbInstanceSummary. Safe pre-create reuse is exact compartment_id plus display_name, restricted to reusable ACTIVE, CREATING, UPDATING, or INACTIVE candidates; duplicate exact matches fail instead of guessing.

Pinned OCI SDK contract: VbInstance and VbInstanceSummary both project nested customEndpoint, alternateCustomEndpoints, and polymorphic networkEndpointDetails state. The reviewed runtime keeps those nested shapes inside required status projection and preserves explicit empty-map and empty-slice clears for tag maps, alternate custom endpoints, and supported public/private endpoint collections.

Repo-authored runtime contract stays narrower than the imported provider surface: ChangeVbInstanceCompartment, StartVbInstance, StopVbInstance, and ReconfigurePrivateEndpointVbInstance remain out-of-scope auxiliary drift for the published kind; consumptionModel and privateEndpointIp remain create-time only; IdcsOpenId is accepted on create but not reconciled after live reads because OCI does not project it back; and isVisualBuilderEnabled is only driven toward true, not disabled in place.
